summary: Refactored Cloudflare package-facing docs toward Site Telemetry Surface realization language while preserving package/API compatibility. The package name, routes, import paths, and NARADA_SITE_REGISTRY_* bindings remain compatibility coordinates, with SiteRegistry documented as one read model served by the surface.
residuals: External deployment names and Cloudflare resources were not changed.
Package rename or broader API deprecation is intentionally deferred; current compatibility names remain active.
